# Davide Paganelli

> Davide Paganelli is an Italian film director based in Rome, Italy. He works with analog film (16mm and Super 8), experimental video, independent cinema and editorial photography. Official website: https://davidepaganelli.it

## About

- Italian film director, based in Rome, Italy
- Studied at a cinema-focused high school, then earned a degree from the European Institute of Design (IED)
- His work focuses on analog photography, experimental video and independent cinema
- Has published photographic editorials in international magazines, including a cover for Vanguard Magazine (New York)
- Currently in post-production on his body horror short film "NATA" and developing his first feature film
- A new project with Toni Pandolfo, shot on 16mm, is in development
- Full bio: https://davidepaganelli.it/about.html

## Video works

- [Maskara](https://davidepaganelli.it/maskara.html): music video for the Italian band Ycon Ydol, shot entirely on 16mm film, produced by Malombra Films. Winner at the Europe Music Video Awards; nominated at the Toronto International Music Video Festival and at the Tokyo International Short Film Festival
- [NATA (trailer)](https://davidepaganelli.it/nata.html): body horror short film, currently in post-production
- [Verrà la Morte](https://davidepaganelli.it/verra-la-morte.html): video art piece shot on Super 8 film

## Editorial photography

- [RottenLand](https://davidepaganelli.it/rottenland.html): photographic editorial, shot on analog film (full PDF on the page)
- [Contributor](https://davidepaganelli.it/contributor.html): photographic editorial
- [Vanguard](https://davidepaganelli.it/vanguard.html): magazine cover, New York
- [SizeFive](https://davidepaganelli.it/sizefive.html): photographic editorial
- [Photo](https://davidepaganelli.it/photo.html): analog photography gallery — Rome and elsewhere
